summary: Admin Event Streaming system fully tested. All 23 backend tests passed (11 new WebSocket streaming tests + 12 existing traffic analytics tests). Frontend Live Event Stream UI verified with all components working: WebSocket connection, pause/resume, clear, type filter, demo filter, and real-time event broadcast.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/traffic/stream-status?admin_key=alphaai_admin_2026 returns connection stats (status, admin_connections, demo_only)
GET /api/admin/traffic/stream-status returns 403 with wrong admin_key
WebSocket /api/ws/admin/events connects with valid admin_key and sends 'connected' message
WebSocket /api/ws/admin/events connects with demo_only=true filter
WebSocket /api/ws/admin/events rejects connection without admin_key (HTTP 403)
WebSocket /api/ws/admin/events rejects connection with wrong admin_key (HTTP 403)
WebSocket responds to ping with pong message
When POST /api/admin/events creates an event, connected WS client receives it in real-time
Multiple admin WS connections receive the same event broadcast
WS client with demo_only=true receives demo events
POST /api/admin/events accepts various event types (page_view, api_call, strategy_view, follow, unfollow, signal, ws_connect, ws_disconnect, upgrade_prompt, checkout_start, checkout_success, error)
POST /api/admin/events without auth creates anonymous event (user_id=null)
POST /api/admin/events with Bearer token sets correct user_id
POST /api/admin/events tags demo mode events with metadata.demo=true
GET /api/admin/traffic/summary returns all 18 metric fields
GET /api/admin/traffic/summary returns 403 with wrong admin_key
GET /api/admin/traffic/summary works with different ranges (24h, 7d, 30d)
GET /api/admin/traffic/timeseries returns time-bucketed series
GET /api/admin/traffic/timeseries returns 403 with wrong admin_key
GET /api/admin/traffic/events returns paginated events with total, page, pages
GET /api/admin/traffic/events supports type filter parameter
GET /api/admin/traffic/events returns 403 with wrong admin_key
GET /api/admin/traffic/events pagination works correctly
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true renders Traffic Analytics title
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows 6 KPI cards (Total Events, Unique Users, Page Views, API Calls, WS Connections, Demo Sessions)
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows Live Event Stream section with 'Connected' status badge
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true Live Event Stream shows Pause/Resume button that toggles correctly
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true Live Event Stream shows Clear button that clears events
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true Live Event Stream has type filter dropdown with all event types
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true Live Event Stream has demo/live filter dropdown
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true Live Event Stream receives and displays events when they occur (verified with POST test)
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows activity charts (Page Views & API Calls, Strategy Interactions)
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows Conversion Funnel section
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows System Health section
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows Raw Events table with pagination
critical_code_review_comments: traffic.py: WebSocket endpoint properly validates admin_key before accepting connection
traffic.py: Uses asyncio.create_task for non-blocking event broadcast to WS clients
traffic.py: Proper heartbeat mechanism with 60s timeout and ping/pong support
admin_events_manager.py: Thread-safe connection management with asyncio.Lock
admin_events_manager.py: Proper cleanup of disconnected clients during broadcast
admin_events_manager.py: demo_only filter correctly filters non-demo events
AdminTrafficPage.jsx: Uses useRef for pausedRef to avoid stale closure issues in WS callback
AdminTrafficPage.jsx: Proper WebSocket reconnection with exponential backoff (max 8 attempts)
AdminTrafficPage.jsx: Auto-scroll to bottom when new events arrive (unless paused)
AdminTrafficPage.jsx: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Event Streaming system fully tested. WebSocket endpoint at /api/ws/admin/events requires admin_key query param. Events posted to POST /api/admin/events are broadcast to all connected admin WS clients via asyncio.create_task. Frontend Live Event Stream panel at /admin/traffic shows real-time events with pause/resume, clear, type filter, and demo filter. WebSocket uses ping/pong for keep-alive and reconnects with exponential backoff. All 23 backend tests pass including 11 new WebSocket streaming tests.

features_tested.ws_ping_pong: PASS - Responds to ping with pong
features_tested.ws_event_broadcast: PASS - Posted events received by connected clients
features_tested.ws_multiple_clients: PASS - Multiple clients receive same broadcast
features_tested.ws_demo_filter: PASS - Demo-only clients receive demo events
features_tested.frontend_type_filter: PASS - Dropdown with all event types
features_tested.frontend_event_broadcast: PASS - Posted events appear in real-time
